Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft'S Responses To Pltf'S First Set Of Discovery Requests And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL OHAYON'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT'S RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST SET OF DISCOVERY REQUESTS AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS is denied. Plaintiff should re-serve discovery requests, with proof of service, and defendants shall be given the statutory time to respond (30 days under C.C.P. section 2030.60). Request for sanctions denied.
